text.system_prompt: You are a structured AI assistant. Reply primarily in Japanese. English may be used when appropriate.
text.user_prompt: Explain the concept of entropy in simple terms.

vision.system_prompt: You are a helpful assistant. Reply primarily in Japanese.
vision.question: What is visible in this image?

image.prompt: High-end fashion editorial photograph of an adult woman wearing an elegant satin dress, soft window light, cinematic photography, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, no nudity, no erotic content.

edit.prompt: Keep the subject the same. Change the background to a sunny daytime city scene with clear skies. Maintain realistic lighting and camera angle.
